---
title: Module `Watchtower`
description: Watchtower RPC methods
date: 2026-06-09
---

## Module `Watchtower`

RPC module for watchtower related operations


### Method `create_watch_channel`

Create a new watched channel

#### Params

* `channel_id` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Channel ID
* `funding_udt_type_script` - `Option<Script>`, Funding UDT type script
* `local_settlement_key` - [Privkey](#type-privkey), The local party's private key used to settle the commitment transaction (hex without 0x prefix)
* `remote_settlement_key` - [Pubkey](#type-pubkey), The remote party's public key used to settle the commitment transaction (hex without 0x prefix)
* `local_funding_pubkey` - [Pubkey](#type-pubkey), The local party's funding public key (hex without 0x prefix)
* `remote_funding_pubkey` - [Pubkey](#type-pubkey), The remote party's funding public key (hex without 0x prefix)
* `settlement_data` - [SettlementData](#type-settlementdata), Settlement data

#### Returns

* None

***



### Method `remove_watch_channel`

Remove a watched channel

#### Params

* `channel_id` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Channel ID

#### Returns

* None

***



### Method `update_revocation`

Update revocation

#### Params

* `channel_id` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Channel ID
* `revocation_data` - [RevocationData](#type-revocationdata), Revocation data
* `settlement_data` - [SettlementData](#type-settlementdata), Settlement data

#### Returns

* None

***



### Method `update_pending_remote_settlement`

Update pending remote settlement

#### Params

* `channel_id` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Channel ID
* `settlement_data` - [SettlementData](#type-settlementdata), Settlement data

#### Returns

* None

***



### Method `update_local_settlement`

Update settlement

#### Params

* `channel_id` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Channel ID
* `settlement_data` - [SettlementData](#type-settlementdata), Settlement data

#### Returns

* None

***



### Method `create_preimage`

Create preimage

#### Params

* `payment_hash` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Payment hash
* `preimage` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Preimage

#### Returns

* None

***



### Method `remove_preimage`

Remove preimage

#### Params

* `payment_hash` - [Hash256](#type-hash256), Payment hash

#### Returns

* None
